documentation: Structured placeholders for civic mobility and dynamic life. Not a traffic simulator; drives narrative + future AODT mobility traces.

flows.label: Student ingress / bell windows
flows.description: Concentrated arrivals aligned with school-day presets; proxy for bus drop-off and foot ingress.

flows.label: School bus corridor (proxy)
flows.description: Placeholder for future GTFS / route polyline import under data/mobility_traces/.

flows.label: Library program / event surge
flows.description: Stacks visitor_ratio with event_high_load; future tie-in to room booking metadata.

flows.label: City Hall service queue (proxy)
flows.description: Queueing story for counter services; numeric prior on visitors_present only until AODT agents land.

flows.label: Surface street vehicle flux (proxy)
flows.description: Next scaling: OSM / aerial vector lanes into Sionna or AODT dynamic scatterers.
